violations.text: The dish machine sanitizer was observed at 0 ppm at the time of inspection. The tubes to the sanitizer and dish detergent were observed improperly set up (in the wrong bottle). The tubing was properly placed, chemicals were primed, and machine was observed properly sanitizing at 50-100ppm at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

Reduced Oxygen Packaged (ROP) Salmon was observed stored thawed in its intact packaging in the Par and Tackle Lower Kitchen Prep Unit. Per instructions on packaging, Salmon is to be removed from packing for thawing prior to being thawing in refrigeration. Salmon was observed at 37 degrees Fahrenheit and removed from packaging for proper storage at the time of inspection. (Proper thawing of ROP Seafood was reviewed.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

Utensils and cups were observed stored displayed with the lip surface up, not inverted. (Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Cups are to be stored inverted to prevent contamination.) Utensils/Equipment were rearranged for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
